title: PDescription$ Function
parameters:
pointData	An
		 integer value or Pnumber or P(expr) or point label.

No
		 variables can be specified for point data parameter.

To
		 use variables, write PDescription$(P(varName)).
see_also:
Returns description of point that defined to the specified point number.

PDef Function

PDescription

PLabel

PLabel$ Function

PDescription$ Function Example

Print PDescription$(1)

Print PDescription$(P(i))
